response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly matches the role. Demonstrates breadth across frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded, plus strong testing/TDD culture and DevOps exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD). Gaps exist around Nest.js, React depth, and Kotlin specifically, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience aligns directly with the AI agent development requirement
Deep full-stack background with TypeScript/Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, custom test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
React exposure is listed but depth and recent usage are unclear
Kotlin is not evidenced; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin evidence
